content:
Perfect — that’ll simplify things. Once you close the Android device, everything will stay synced on your account, so your threads, archive status, and current conversation will all be right where you left them when you open ChatGPT on the iPad. A few quick tips for smooth continuity on the iPad:  
- **Keep Safari or the ChatGPT app open in Split View** if you like referencing other materials while talking here.  
- **Disable Auto-Lock temporarily** before your noon interview so the screen doesn’t dim mid-session.  
- If the psychiatrist sends any documents afterward (like a report or summary), **save or screenshot** them immediately; iOS makes it easy to drop them into your Files app or Photos for later upload here if you’d like help interpreting the report. Once you’re set up on the iPad, would you like to do a brief run-through of how to capture and store that evaluation report when you receive it — so you can archive it cleanly alongside your SSDI materials?
